Current configuration : 3187 bytes
!
! Last configuration change at 22:18:25 UTC Tue May 12 2026 by admin
!
version 15.6
service timestamps debug datetime msec
service timestamps log datetime msec
no service password-encryption
!
hostname router2-ios
!
boot-start-marker
boot-end-marker
!
!
!
no aaa new-model
ethernet lmi ce
!
!
!
mmi polling-interval 60
no mmi auto-configure
no mmi pvc
mmi snmp-timeout 180
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
ip domain name lab.com
ip cef
no ipv6 cef
!
multilink bundle-name authenticated
!
!
!
!
username cisco privilege 15 secret 5 $1$gw3n$1UukIze.M.DcuU58Xam7W/
username admin privilege 15 secret 5 $1$ZVtC$VM1/VKIUUOhbt/xVLFzo7/
!
redundancy
!
!
! 
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 ip address 10.255.1.101 255.255.255.0
 duplex auto
 speed auto
 media-type rj45
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 no ip address
 shutdown
 duplex auto
 speed auto
 media-type rj45
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/2
 no ip address
 shutdown
 duplex auto
 speed auto
 media-type rj45
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/3
 no ip address
 shutdown
 duplex auto
 speed auto
 media-type rj45
!
ip forward-protocol nd
!
!
no ip http server
no ip http secure-server
!
!
!
!
control-plane
!

line con 0
 exec-timeout 0 0
 logging synchronous
 login local
line aux 0
line vty 0 4

 transport input ssh
